name: Power Credit Card

specialSpendRules.notes: 21X points per Rs 150 spent on HPCL fuel (capped at 700 points/cycle on spends up to Rs 5,000).
15X points per Rs 150 spent on grocery and utility bills (capped at 400 points/cycle on combined spends up to Rs 4,000).
15X points per Rs 150 spent on grocery and utility bills (capped at 400 points/cycle on combined spends up to Rs 4,000).

additionalBenefits: 3.5% return value in Reward Points on HPCL fuel spends plus 1.5% as Happy Coins on HP Pay app
2.5% return value on grocery and utility spends
1% fuel surcharge waiver up to Rs 100 per statement cycle at HPCL stations
Reward points are valid for 24 months

salaried: Minimum net monthly salary of Rs 20,000

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-14.
HPCL fuel co-branded credit card. 21X points per Rs 150 spent on HPCL fuel (capped at 700 points/cycle).
15X points per Rs 150 spent on grocery and utility bills (capped at 400 points/cycle on combined spends up to Rs 4,000).
2X points per Rs 150 spent on other retail and UPI transactions (value: 0.33% return).
Annual fee of Rs 199 is waived on spending Rs 50,000 in the preceding anniversary year.
